channel.title: GDACS RSS information
channel.description: Near real-time notification about natural disaster with a potential humanitarian impact

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 6.9M, Depth:101.331km) in Chile 25/05/2026 21:52 UTC, 160 thousand in 100km.
item.description: On 5/25/2026 9:52:19 PM, an earthquake occurred in Chile potentially affecting 160 thousand in 100km. The earthquake had Magnitude 6.9M, Depth:101.331km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright notice: European Union (CC BY 4.0), reuse is allowed, provided appropriate credit to GDACS is given.

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:31.057km) in Indonesia 25/05/2026 20:39 UTC, 3 thousand in MMI IV.
item.description: On 5/25/2026 8:39:20 PM, an earthquake occurred in Indonesia potentially affecting 3 thousand in MMI IV. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:31.057km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 6M, Depth:22.36km) in United States 23/05/2026 07:46 UTC, 9 thousand (in MMI>=VII).
item.description: On 5/23/2026 7:46:01 AM, an earthquake occurred in United States potentially affecting 9 thousand (in MMI>=VII). The earthquake had Magnitude 6M, Depth:22.36km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km) in Southeast Indian Ridge 23/05/2026 05:41 UTC, [unknown].
item.description: On 5/23/2026 5:41:34 AM, an earthquake occurred in Southeast Indian Ridge potentially affecting [unknown]. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:10km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:14.926km) in United States 22/05/2026 12:16 UTC, Few people affected in MMI III.
item.description: On 5/22/2026 12:16:14 PM, an earthquake occurred in United States potentially affecting Few people affected in MMI III. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:14.926km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1
item.gdacs:population: Few people affected in MMI III

item.title: Green flood alert in Bulgaria
item.description: On 22/05/2026, a flood started in Bulgaria, lasting until 24/05/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 70 displaced .
item.dc:subject: FL1

item.title: Drought is on going in Australia
item.description: The Drought notification level is Green.
item.dc:subject: DR1
item.gdacs:severity: Minor impact for agricultural drought in 74596 km2
